subcodes.first_line: O friends of God! Every assembly is in need of seasoned members who are worthy of its membership and are endowed with innate capacities
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی هر انجمنی را اعضای ممتحنی که لیاقت عضویت و استعداد ماهیت دارند
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters, @spiritual transformation
